rag_rules: Place AGREE annex contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees.
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds when defining range constraints in component type contracts.
generic_rules: Ensure that annex contracts are scoped correctly to match the component type or implementation level.
Define value range constraints using visible identifiers and clear threshold relations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use boolean expressions to define range conditions: eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;
Annotate component type contracts with assumptions and guarantees that reference valid feature names.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without proper variable representation.
